---
title: "Univariate G-Theory Verification: Mental-Health (3-level Sensitivity)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(lme4); library(dplyr); library(tibble); library(knitr); library(numDeriv)
ROOT <- "/Users/veronica/Claude/01. Research"
setwd(ROOT)
source("univariate/src/shared/univariate_workflow.R")
```

# Load Model & Data

```{r load}
env <- new.env(); load("univariate/outputs/lme4/mental_health_sensitivity_results.RData", envir = env)
all_models <- env$results
fit <- all_models$nested_seed_temperature$fit

dat <- mg_prepare_univariate_data(task = "mental_health_3level", data_path = "data/mh_labeling_final.csv")
n_m <- nlevels(dat$evaluator); n_p <- nlevels(dat$prompt_type)
n_t <- nlevels(dat$temperature); n_s <- nlevels(dat$seed)
cat(sprintf("Design: %d items x %d evaluators x %d prompts x %d temps x %d seeds = %d rows\n",
            nlevels(dat$item_id), n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s, nrow(dat)))
cat("\n3-level severity distribution:\n")
print(table(dat$severity[!duplicated(paste(dat$item_id, dat$evaluator, dat$prompt_type, dat$temperature, dat$seed))]))
```

# BIC Model Comparison

```{r bic}
bic_tbl <- bind_rows(lapply(names(all_models), function(nm) {
  m <- all_models[[nm]]
  if (is.null(m$fit)) return(NULL)
  tibble(Model = nm, BIC = BIC(m$fit), AIC = AIC(m$fit),
         logLik = as.numeric(logLik(m$fit)), Singular = isSingular(m$fit))
}))
kable(bic_tbl, digits = 1, caption = "Model comparison by BIC")
```

# Variance Components

```{r varcomp}
comp_tbl <- mg_univariate_component_table(fit)
kable(comp_tbl %>% mutate(pct = sprintf("%.1f%%", prop_total * 100),
                           variance = round(variance, 6)) %>%
        select(component, variance, pct, component_type),
      caption = "Variance components (nested_seed_temperature)")
```

# G-Coefficients — Recomputed

```{r gcoeff}
compute_g_phi <- function(ct, nm, np, nt, ns) {
  sigma_tau <- mg_get_component_variance(ct, "item_id")
  item_int <- ct %>% filter(component_type == "item_interaction")
  sigma_delta <- 0
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(item_int))) {
    parts <- setdiff(strsplit(item_int$component[i], ":", fixed = TRUE)[[1]], "item_id")
    div <- 1
    for (p in parts) div <- div * switch(p, evaluator=nm, prompt_type=np, temperature=nt, seed=ns, 1)
    sigma_delta <- sigma_delta + item_int$variance[i] / div
  }
  sigma_delta <- sigma_delta + mg_get_component_variance(ct, "Residual") / (nm*np*nt*ns)
  facet_c <- ct %>% filter(component_type == "facet_component")
  sigma_abs <- 0
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(facet_c))) {
    parts <- strsplit(facet_c$component[i], ":", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    div <- 1
    for (p in parts) div <- div * switch(p, evaluator=nm, prompt_type=np, temperature=nt, seed=ns, 1)
    sigma_abs <- sigma_abs + facet_c$variance[i] / div
  }
  list(erho2 = sigma_tau / (sigma_tau + sigma_delta),
       phi = sigma_tau / (sigma_tau + sigma_delta + sigma_abs))
}

obs <- compute_g_phi(comp_tbl, n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s)
cat(sprintf("Recomputed Erho2 = %.4f\nRecomputed Phi   = %.4f\n", obs$erho2, obs$phi))
```

# Bootstrap CIs — Loaded

```{r bootstrap}
phi_env <- new.env(); load("univariate/outputs/lme4/mental_health_sensitivity_phi_dstudy.RData", envir = phi_env)
boot_res <- phi_env$result$obs_boot
cat(sprintf("Bootstrap (B=%d valid):\n  Erho2: [%.4f, %.4f]\n  Phi:   [%.4f, %.4f]\n",
            boot_res$n_used,
            boot_res$ci_g_lower, boot_res$ci_g_upper,
            boot_res$ci_phi_lower, boot_res$ci_phi_upper))
cat("\nNOTE: Check if these CIs are identical to 7-level model (known bug).\n")
```

# Wald CIs — Recomputed

```{r wald}
theta <- getME(fit, "theta"); sig <- sigma(fit)
vc_templ <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(fit))
build_ct <- function(th, s, vt) {
  rr <- vt[vt$grp != "Residual", ]
  bind_rows(tibble(component = rr$grp, variance = th^2 * s^2),
            tibble(component = "Residual", variance = s^2)) %>%
    group_by(component) %>% summarise(variance = sum(variance), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(facet_group = mg_map_univariate_facet_group(component),
           component_type = mg_map_univariate_component_type(component),
           prop_total = variance / sum(variance)) %>% arrange(desc(variance))
}
phi_fn <- function(th) {
  ct <- build_ct(th, sig, vc_templ)
  gp <- compute_g_phi(ct, n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s)
  c(Erho2 = gp$erho2, Phi = gp$phi)
}
ctrl <- lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000))
dd <- lmer(formula(fit), data = fit@frame, REML = FALSE, control = ctrl, devFunOnly = TRUE)
H <- numDeriv::hessian(dd, theta)
V_theta <- tryCatch(2 * solve(H), error = function(e) 2 * MASS::ginv(H))
J <- numDeriv::jacobian(phi_fn, theta)
V_phi <- J %*% V_theta %*% t(J)
se <- sqrt(pmax(diag(V_phi), 0)); pt <- phi_fn(theta); z <- qnorm(0.975)
kable(tibble(Parameter = names(pt), Point = pt, SE = se,
             Lower = pt - z*se, Upper = pt + z*se),
      digits = 4, caption = "Analytic Wald 95% CIs")
```

# D-Study Projections — Recomputed

```{r dstudy}
designs <- tribble(
  ~scenario, ~nE, ~nP, ~nT, ~nS,
  "A: Minimal (1x1x1x1)",1,1,1,1, "B: 1x3",1,3,1,1, "C: 2x1",2,1,1,1,
  "D: Current (4x3x6x3)",4,3,6,3, "E: 3x2",3,2,1,1, "F: 4x3x1x1",4,3,1,1,
  "G: 2x3x3x1",2,3,3,1, "H: 6x3x1x1",6,3,1,1, "I: 4x5x1x1",4,5,1,1)
ds <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(designs)), function(i) {
  d <- designs[i,]; gp <- compute_g_phi(comp_tbl, d$nE, d$nP, d$nT, d$nS)
  tibble(Scenario=d$scenario, nE=d$nE, nP=d$nP, Erho2=round(gp$erho2,4),
         Phi=round(gp$phi,4), Cells=d$nE*d$nP*d$nT*d$nS)
}))
kable(ds, caption = "D-Study projections")
```

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
